div.t-att-style: 'position:relative; width:%smm; height:%smm; margin:0; padding:0; font-size:9px;' % (t.page_width_mm, t.page_height_mm)
'position:absolute; left:0mm; top:0mm; width:%smm; height:%smm; border:0.3mm solid #000;' % (t.page_width_mm-0.6, t.page_height_mm-0.6)
'position:absolute; left:%smm; top:0mm; width:0.2mm; height:%smm; background:#bbb;' % (x, t.page_height_mm)
'position:absolute; left:0mm; top:%smm; height:0.2mm; width:%smm; background:#bbb;' % (y, t.page_width_mm)
'position:absolute; left:%smm; top:%smm; width:6mm; height:0.3mm; background:#000;' % (t.check_no_left_mm + t.offset_left_mm, t.check_no_top_mm + t.offset_top_mm)
'position:absolute; left:%smm; top:%smm; width:0.3mm; height:6mm; background:#000;' % (t.check_no_left_mm + t.offset_left_mm, t.check_no_top_mm + t.offset_top_mm)
